title: Support Tickets
description: Raise a ticket, track it, and escalate when the assistant cannot help.

steps.title: Your tickets
steps.description: Each ticket carries a priority and a status.
steps.voiceScript: Each ticket carries a priority and a status you can follow.
steps.captionText: Each ticket carries a priority and a status you can follow.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your tickets: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Raise one
steps.description: The helpline assistant can escalate for you.
steps.voiceScript: Raise a ticket, or let the helpline assistant escalate for you.
steps.captionText: Raise a ticket, or let the helpline assistant escalate for you.
steps.fallbackMessage: Raise one: not visible on this screen yet.
